listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #406
listings.description: Pilot Travel Center at I-65 Exit 22 in Cornersville. 24-hour truck stop with diesel, convenience store, deli, showers, certified CAT Scale, and truck parking.
listings.corroboration: Official Pilot Flying J locator (locations.pilotflyingj.com) returns 403 to the agent proxy (egress-policy blocked). Identity, address, exit, phone, and CAT Scale corroborated across 4 independent directories (truckstopsandservices, findfuelstops, parkadvisor, findtruckservice). Store slightly below the exit 27-53 window but included because Cornersville is a named target city.

listings.name: CAT Scale — Pilot Travel Center #406, Cornersville
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #406, I-65 Exit 22, Cornersville. Open 24 hours.
listings.corroboration: Official CAT Scale locator (catscale.com) is egress-policy blocked (403 CONNECT). CAT Scale presence at this Pilot corroborated by truckstopsandservices ('Scales - Certified'), 4RoadService CAT Scale provider page, and Allstays TN CAT Scale list.

listings.name: The Tennessean Truck & Travel Stop
listings.description: Independent 24/7 truck and travel stop at I-65 Exit 22 in Cornersville (established 1974; now branded Dolly's Tennessean Travel Stop). Diesel, showers, laundry, restaurant, driver lounge and truck parking.
listings.corroboration: Official site (tennesseantravelstop.com / dollystravelstops.com), ExxonMobil station finder, TruckMap, and truckstopsandservices all confirm an operating independent truck stop at 3686 Pulaski Hwy, Cornersville, I-65 Exit 22. Distinct facility from Pilot #406 (different address/lot). Phone left blank (not consistently confirmed). truck_spaces left blank (only a single unverified count of ~75).

listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #346
listings.description: Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 46 (Bear Creek Pike / SR-99 / US-412) in Columbia. 24-hour truck stop with diesel, showers, certified CAT Scale, Arby's, on-site Love's Truck Care, and truck parking; RV-friendly.
listings.corroboration: Official loves.com page returns 403 to the agent proxy. Address, phone, exit 46, showers, diesel lanes, CAT Scale, and Love's Truck Care corroborated by truckstopsandservices, TruckMap, Find Truck Service, and RVParky. truck_spaces left blank due to source conflict (80 vs 100).

listings.name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #346, Columbia
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #346, I-65 Exit 46 (Bear Creek Pike / SR-99), Columbia. Open 24 hours.
listings.corroboration: Official CAT Scale locator is egress-policy blocked (403). CAT Scale at Love's #346 corroborated by truckstopsandservices ('CAT Scales / Scales - Certified'), a dedicated 'CAT Scale - Columbia, TN' business page, and Allstays TN CAT Scale list. Scale phone matches Love's #346 (931-388-1217).

listings.name: Love's Truck Care — Love's Travel Stop #346
listings.description: Love's Truck Care service center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #346, I-65 Exit 46, Columbia. Tire service, light mechanical, oil/PM services and roadside assistance from on-site service bays.
listings.corroboration: Love's Truck Care on-site presence corroborated by a dedicated Love's Truck Care (Columbia) business listing, truckstopsandservices, and Find Truck Service. Categorized as 'Tire Repair' consistent with existing production Love's Truck Care entries. Follows the co-location model (separate row from the host Love's #346 truck stop).

listings.name: Quality Inn Columbia I-65
listings.description: Choice Hotels Quality Inn near I-65 Exit 46 (Bear Creek Pike) in Columbia. Third-party listings indicate RV/bus/truck parking is available; not confirmed on the official brand page.
listings.hold_reason: Truck/large-vehicle parking is stated only by third-party OTA listings (HotelPlanner, Expedia, HotelGuides); not confirmed on the official Choice Hotels page and no space count available. Category-fit (truck parking) unverified.
listings.corroboration: Identity/address/exit 46 confirmed across Choice Hotels, HotelPlanner, Yelp and Expedia. Truck parking claim appears only in aggregator amenity blurbs; held pending official confirmation.

excluded.name: Tennessee Weigh Station — I-65 (Giles County / Ardmore, near AL state line)
excluded.reason: Out of segment. THP District 7 scale complex sits at the south end of I-65 near the Alabama line (approx. exits 1-14, Giles County), well below the exit 27-53 window. Official THP CVE page (tn.gov) is egress-blocked (403), so direction/status could not be TDOT/THP-confirmed anyway.

excluded.name: Tennessee Weigh Station — I-65 (converted to truck parking, north of Nashville)
excluded.reason: Out of segment. The northbound weigh station converted to truck parking (TDOT project between SR-25 and SR-109, completed Sept 2024) is north of Nashville, far above exit 53.

excluded.name: I-65 Welcome Centers (Ardmore MM3 NB; Mitchellville MM121 SB)
excluded.reason: Out of segment. The only TDOT I-65 welcome centers/rest areas are at MM3 (AL line) and MM121 (KY side of Nashville); none between exits 27-53 (Marshall/Maury/Williamson).

excluded.name: Auto/glass shops in Spring Hill & Thompson's Station (Autobody Advantage, Safelite, Tire Discounters)
excluded.reason: Not freight/truck facilities. Only passenger auto-body, glass, and retail tire shops found near I-65 Exit 53; no verifiable truck stop, truck-service, truck wash, or heavy-duty tire facility.

excluded.name: Truck Parking Club — Columbia, TN (generic listing)
excluded.reason: Could not confirm a specific facility identity or street address for a standalone Truck Parking Club lot in this segment; no verifiable row could be built.

excluded.name: Alleged truck stop at I-65 Exit 32 / Exit 37 / Exit 53
excluded.reason: No independently verifiable truck stop, CAT Scale, truck wash, or tire facility found at these exits; a vague 'Pilot near Exit 32' snippet could not be corroborated and appears to conflate the Exit 22 Pilot.
